insight.title: How did you find the add button?
insight.subtitle: Plus sign means create
insight.plusDesc: Plus icon means add new on any platform.
insight.pickerDesc: Scroll picker is standard for time entry.
insight.saveDesc: Save action is top right corner.

insight.title: How did you find day settings?
insight.subtitle: 7 circles equals one week
insight.dotDesc: 7 buttons in a row represent weekday selection.
insight.weekdayDesc: Selecting 5 consecutive days means weekdays only.
insight.highlightDesc: Highlighted buttons are the selected days.

insight.title: How did you turn off snooze?
insight.subtitle: Toggle switch means on or off
insight.toggleTitle: Toggle switch is on or off
insight.toggleDesc: Toggle switches control feature on or off.
insight.colorDesc: Gray means off, colored means on.

insight.title: How did you delete by swiping?
insight.subtitle: Left swipe reveals hidden actions
insight.swipeDesc: Swipe left to reveal delete action.
